get in.translate: 1) Входить, садиться (в транспорт) 2) Прибывать (о поезде, самолёте)
examples: She got in the taxi and left.
How do I get in the building?
When do you get in from your trip?
He got in through the back door.
Get in before it starts raining.
The bus gets in every hour.
We got in late last night.
The train gets in at 6 PM.
Get in the car, we're leaving.
What time does your flight get in?
example_translate: Она села в такси и уехала.
get in.synonyms:
Входить, садиться (в транспорт) - enter, board
Прибывать (о поезде, самолёте) - arrive, reach
